name: @gyaan/dsl
description: The GYAAN slide DSL: the pure, dependency-free contract (types + JSON Schema + validators + version/migration helpers) that @gyaan/renderer and @gyaan/importer both depend on.

scripts.clean: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); fs.rmSync('dist', {recursive: true, force: true})"
scripts.build: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); fs.rmSync('dist', {recursive: true, force: true})" && tsc -p tsconfig.json
